title: diasperus cyclanthera
intro: Diasperus cyclanthera, also known as the gac fruit, is a type of plant native to Asia that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly the seeds, which are high in vitamin A and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including eye problems, inflammation, and fever. The health benefits of diasperus cyclanthera include its ability to improve vision, boost the immune system, and reduce the risk of cancer. Diasperus cyclanthera is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
